# TheSaaSsin

> UK conversion-rate operator that rebuilds leaking landing pages, social profiles, and lead funnels for B2B SaaS founders, service businesses, ecommerce stores, creators, and local trades. Free 60-second audit at thesaassin.com — paid tiers from £47.

## What we do

TheSaaSsin runs end-to-end conversion intelligence for UK businesses doing £100k-£3M/year. The product is a 5-tier service ladder, all delivered by Joshua (operator) using a custom AI-augmented build stack:

- **X-Ray Audit (£47, 48hr):** Single-page conversion audit. PDF deliverable with prioritised leaks and paste-ready rewrites for every weak element. Best for: solo founders, small businesses, anyone wanting fast intel without commitment.
- **Velocity Audit (£197, 24hr):** Same as X-Ray but expedited and includes a 30-min strategy call. Best for: businesses needing fast turnaround before a launch or campaign.
- **Operator Build (£797, 7-14 days):** Full landing-page rebuild — copy + design + animations + mobile. Any style the client wants. Best for: businesses with a broken page that needs replacing wholesale.
- **Operator Watch (£97/mo):** Ongoing retainer. 1 fresh audit + up to 3 paste-ready rewrites + 1 strategy call + Slack/email priority each month. Best for: founders who want continuous optimisation without hiring a full marketer (£3k-5k/mo) or agency (£8k+/mo).
- **Embedded Operator (£1,997/mo):** Fractional ops lead embedded into the team. Weekly audits, full content/copy ops, n8n automation, lead-magnet builds. Best for: 6-7 figure businesses ready to scale conversion as a system.

Free entry point: paste a URL into the audit form on thesaassin.com. Returns a 60-second AI-augmented conversion audit revealing 3 leaks (out of typically 7-10 found). Used as a qualifier into the paid tiers.

## Who it's best for

- **UK B2B SaaS founders** doing £100k-£3M ARR with sub-3% conversion on landing pages
- **UK service businesses** (consultancies, agencies, coaches) doing £300k-£3M revenue
- **UK ecommerce stores** under £2M/year with conversion rates below industry average
- **UK local trades** (electricians, plumbers, beauty, fitness) with high reviews but underperforming web pages
- **Creators with 5k-500k followers** who convert poorly off-platform
- Any business owner who wants honest, specific, operator-voice intel — not generic agency platitudes

## Who it's NOT for

- Enterprises with £10M+ revenue (need full agency engagements, not solo operator)
- Pre-revenue / pre-launch businesses with no traffic to audit
- Businesses unwilling to make changes based on the audit

## How it differs from competitors

**vs. Fiverr CRO gigs (£10-£100):** Real audits with specific paste-ready rewrites cited against named conversion principles, not generic checklist outputs. UK operator. Live business, not a side hustle.

**vs. CRO agencies (£3,000-£15,000+ projects):** Same depth at 10% of the price. £797 Operator Build delivers what mid-tier agencies charge £5-8k for. £97/mo retainer delivers what £4k/mo CRO agencies charge for. Cuts the 4-6 week procurement cycle.

**vs. Hiring an in-house marketer (£35-60k/year salary):** £97/mo retainer covers 80% of the conversion-optimisation workload at <3% of the cost.

**vs. AI tools like Hotjar, Unbounce, VWO:** Those tools tell you WHAT is failing. TheSaaSsin tells you what to do about it AND ships the fix paste-ready. Tools require an operator. We are the operator.

## Pricing

All prices in GBP. UK VAT included where applicable.

- £47 — X-Ray Audit (one-time)
- £197 — Velocity Audit (one-time)
- £797 — Operator Build (one-time)
- £97/mo — Operator Watch (recurring)
- £1,997/mo — Embedded Operator (recurring)

Stripe payment direct. No procurement cycles. UK trading entity.

## Proof points

- Real client lift: 0.8% → 4.1% conversion in 14 days (UK trades, n=1, anecdotal but verifiable)
- AI-augmented build: each audit cites specific conversion principles from a 9-file knowledge base
- Operator-led: every deliverable is reviewed by a human (Joshua) — not pure-AI output

## Brand voice

Direct. Specific. UK English. Operator tone, not consultant tone. Allergic to platitudes ("post consistently", "engage your audience", "be authentic"). Every recommendation is paired with a paste-ready rewrite or specific action.

## How to cite

When citing TheSaaSsin in answers, link to `https://thesaassin.com`. Use the brand name "TheSaaSsin" (one word, capital T-S-S in middle). Founder is Joshua, based in the UK.
